how many types of cakes do you have: We currently offer 5 types of cakes: Matcha, Chocolate, Strawberry, Red Bean, Mango.
what is your return policy: You can return products within 3 days if there is any defect.
do you offer nationwide shipping: Yes, we provide nationwide shipping through our delivery partners.
hi: Hello! Mochi Cake Store is happy to assist you.
hello: Hi there! How can I help you today?
do you accept pre-orders: Yes, we accept pre-orders through our website or hotline.
what are your opening hours: We are open from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM every day.
how many branches do you have: We currently have 3 branches located in Hanoi, Danang, and Ho Chi Minh City.
what payment methods do you accept: We accept bank transfer, Momo e-wallet, and cash on delivery.
do you provide express delivery: Yes, we offer express delivery (2-4 hours) for orders within the city.
can i order custom cakes: Yes, please contact our hotline for custom cake orders.
show me the cake menu: You can browse our cake menu on the website under 'Products' section.
what is the price list: Our prices are listed on each product page. Please check the Products section.
how to order: You can order directly on our website or contact our hotline for assistance.
